meaning: n.[希神]普罗米修斯(造福于人类的神)
examples: Prometheus lit a torch from the chariot and put the fire in a hollow stalk that he concealed under his cloak.
This year marks exactly two centuries since the publication of "Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus," by Mary Shelley.
